content.speakerText: Hey there! How's it going? Can I help you find something today?
content.speakerTextCn: 嗨！最近怎么样？今天需要帮忙找什么吗？
expectedAnswers: Hi! I need a cordless drill.
Hey! I'm looking for a power drill — any good ones in stock?
Hello! I want to buy an electric drill for my workshop.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确表达需要购买电钻
语言准确性：语法正确，无明显错误
表达自然度：使用口语缩写（如'I'm'、'any'），避免过于正式
关键词覆盖：使用 'cordless drill' 或 'power drill' 等场景关键词

content.speakerText: Sure thing! We've got a few models — are you DIYing or doing professional work?
content.speakerTextCn: 当然！我们有几款，你是自己用还是专业施工？
expectedAnswers: Just for home stuff — like hanging shelves.
I'm a carpenter, so I need a heavy-duty one.
Home use. I'm fixing up my garage.
evaluationCriteria: 意图达成度：明确区分 DIY 或专业用途
语言准确性：语法正确，使用恰当词汇（如 'heavy-duty'）
表达自然度：使用口语化表达（如 'stuff', 'fixing up'）
关键词覆盖：使用 'DIY', 'professional', 'heavy-duty', 'home use' 等场景关键词
